document_subtype: Certificate of Eligibility for Nonimmigrant Student Status
plain_english_purpose: Confirms a student's admission to an SEVP-certified school and eligibility to apply for an F-1 student visa and maintain student status.
required_actions: Keep the document with your passport
Request a travel signature before international travel if required
common_confusions: I-20 expiration is not the same as visa expiration.
SEVIS ID is different from a USCIS receipt number.
notes_for_app_design: Highlight SEVIS ID, school name, program dates, financial information, and travel endorsement.
